commit.message:
fix: proper AdPlug transport wiring — no auto-play, position sync, single audio source

Architecture (matches Hively/Furnace pattern):
- WASM streaming player renders audio
- Extracted patterns are display-only
- Transport play/stop controls the streaming player

Changes:
- AdPlugPlayer: add play() method, onPosition/onEnded callbacks, autoPlay param
- Worklet: report position ~15fps via adplug_get_position/adplug_get_row
- C++ WASM: add adplug_get_position() and adplug_get_row() exports
- TrackerReplayer.play(): detect all-OPL3 songs, start AdPlug streaming,
  wire position to coordinator.dispatchEnginePosition(), suppress TS notes
- TrackerReplayer.stop(): stop AdPlug streaming, clean up position sub
- UnifiedFileLoader: load with autoPlay=false when extraction succeeded,
  remove preloadInstruments (no standalone OPL3 synth instances needed)
- Fix companion-retry path: same treatment (no preload, no early return)

Fixes: loud hit on load, double audio on play, auto-play on drop

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix auth: support scheme-prefixed tokens (github/aad/Bearer)

The devtunnel CLI outputs tokens with scheme prefix like 'github <token>'
or 'aad <token>'. Previously we always prepended 'github ' which caused
401 errors when using CLI tokens.

Now auto-detects known auth schemes (github, aad, bearer, tunnel,
tunnelplan) and uses the token as-is when a prefix is present.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

  upgrading. Use --force to skip the prompt. Never auto-advances.
- New src/lib/version.js: getLatestTag, getCurrentTag, getAvailableTags,
  checkoutTag utilities

an update. Agents/skills refresh independently (they come from the CLI
package, not the submodule).

commit.message:
r600: close C6 Post-RA PV/PS hazard — not real in SFN architecture

SFN RA spills insert at block boundaries only (sfn_ra.cpp:500-560).
PV/PS chains are intra-block. Therefore RA spills cannot break PV/PS
chains, and the C6 Post-RA Repair pass is unnecessary.

KCACHE rollback fixes for the Active PV/PS Seeker committed on x130e
as a0ef9ca434b (amended into the seeker commit).

Debugging revealed the disk cache (Phase 4D, f579f0d42a9) was silently
serving pre-compiled bytecode, hiding the fact that SFN changes were
never being exercised. Always nuke ~/.cache/mesa_shader_cache* and set
MESA_SHADER_CACHE_DISABLE=true when validating compiler changes.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

- Jetty stubs with guaranteed shape clearance

- User waypoint overrides in ArrowData.waypoints[]
- Collinear elimination
- Canvas2D rendering (no cache bugs)

commit.message:
fix: agentes não liam o DNA completo — 2 bugs críticos em getClientDNA

Bug 1 — campos curados pelo ORACLE eram ignorados:
  getClientDNA() só lia o campo 'voz' do client_dna.
  Agora lê biografia, voz, credenciais E proibidas — cada um com
  label claro (ex: '### FRASES E TERMOS PROIBIDOS') para que a
  VERA entenda o filtro Antiguru corretamente.

Bug 2 — filtro de keyword excluía knowledge_files válidos:
  Antes: só incluía arquivos que continham 'BRAND VOICE', 'COPY',
  'PALAVRAS', 'TOM' ou 'VOZ' no texto — ignorava qualquer doc que
  usasse outras palavras (mesmo com DNA completo).
  Agora: inclui TODOS os knowledge_files não-HTML/CSS na memória.

Outros:
  - Limite de memories: 20 → 50
  - dna-preview ?format=html: nova seção 'Documentos de Conhecimento'
    mostra qual arquivo está/não está na memória da IA
  - dna-preview: mostra campos curados (biografia/voz/credenciais/
    proibidas) com contagem de chars por campo
  - Banner de alerta quando brand_voice está vazio

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: support field-level nullValue override in messages

When a field specifies nullValue attribute (e.g., nullValue='0'), use that
value instead of the type catalog default for the optional null sentinel.

Changes:
- OptionalMessageFieldDefinition: add NullValue parameter, use it in
  null comparison generation
- MessagesCodeGenerator: pass field.NullValue to OptionalMessageFieldDefinition,
  use effectivePrimitiveType (fallback to resolvedType when underlyingType
  is null for direct primitive optional fields)

This also fixes a bug where direct primitive fields with presence='optional'
(e.g., <field type='int64' presence='optional'/>) would not generate
nullable property accessors because underlyingType was null.

Fix signing for aspire-managed bundle payload (#16016)

Split the bundle payload pipeline step into three phases so that
aspire-managed goes through Arcade's signing infrastructure before
CreateLayout packs it into the bundle archive:

1. dotnet publish - produces the self-contained single-file binary
2. build.cmd/sh -restore -sign - Arcade signs it via ItemsToSign
3. Bundle.proj /t:_RestoreDcpPackage;_RunCreateLayout - creates the
   tar.gz archive with the already-signed binary

Changes:
- eng/Signing.props: Add FileSignInfo and ItemsToSign entries for
  aspire-managed.exe (Windows) and aspire-managed (Linux/macOS)
- eng/pipelines/templates/BuildAndTest.yml: Split bundle payload step
  into publish, sign, and layout steps per RID
- eng/pipelines/templates/build_sign_native.yml: Same restructuring
  for macOS/Linux native stage (sign step conditional on codeSign)

Fixes https://github.com/microsoft/aspire/issues/15989

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Refactor McpFunctionMetadataTransformer using Builder pattern with pluggable steps (#216)

* Refactor McpFunctionMetadataTransformer using Builder pattern with pluggable steps

Decomposes the monolithic McpFunctionMetadataTransformer into a fluent
McpBindingBuilder with pluggable extension method steps. Each transformation
concern lives in its own file and can be added or removed without modifying
the builder itself.

New builder steps:
- AddToolProperties: resolves tool properties from options/attributes
- AddPromptArguments: resolves prompt arguments from options/attributes
- AddMetadata: applies fluent + attributed metadata for tool/resource/prompt
- AddAppUiMetadata: merges MCP App UI metadata and emits synthetic functions
- PatchPropertyBindings: patches mcpToolProperty bindings with type info

Also extracts MetadataMerger as a standalone utility class.

Rebased on top of main, incorporating prompt support (#210/#211),
MCP Apps fluent API (#226), and instrumentation changes.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Address feedback

commit.message:
fix: reduce /enabled endpoint traffic and surface unexpected status codes (#308879)

* fix: cache CCA disabled results with 5-min TTL to reduce /enabled traffic

The checkCCAEnabled() method previously only cached enabled=true results
(introduced in 19541d79eaf). For the majority of users whose repos have CCA
disabled, every provideChatSessionProviderOptions() call bypassed the cache
and hit the jobs/:owner/:repo/enabled CAPI endpoint unconditionally. With
growing adoption, this became significant upstream traffic.

Fix: cache all /enabled results. enabled=true keeps the 30-min TTL.
enabled=false/undefined uses a new 5-min TTL (CCA_DISABLED_CACHE_TTL_MS),
short enough that users who just enabled CCA won't wait long, but long enough
to dramatically reduce repeated calls.

To support the shorter TTL for disabled entries without changing the enabled
TTL, TtlCache.set() now accepts an optional per-entry ttlMs override that
takes precedence over the cache-wide TTL.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: surface unexpected /enabled status codes (e.g. 429) in telemetry

Previously, isCCAEnabled's default case returned { enabled: undefined }
with no statusCode, swallowing 429 rate-limit and 5xx responses.

Changes:
- Widen CCAEnabledResult.statusCode from 401|403|422 to number so
  unexpected codes can be propagated
- Return statusCode: response.status in isCCAEnabled's default case
- Add sendTelemetryErrorEvent('copilot.codingAgent.CCAIsEnabledUnexpectedStatus')
  in checkCCAEnabled for any status code outside {401, 403, 422}, with
  isRateLimited flag for quick 429 filtering in dashboards

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* refactor: hoist knownStatusCodes to constant and add GDPR annotation

- Extract CCA_KNOWN_STATUS_CODES to file-level Set to avoid re-creating
  it on every call and centralize the list of handled status codes
- Add __GDPR__ comment block for the new
  copilot.codingAgent.CCAIsEnabledUnexpectedStatus telemetry error event

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: support optional float/double fields with NaN null sentinel

Add float.NaN and double.NaN to TypesCatalog.NullValueByType so optional
float/double fields no longer emit SBE010 warning.

Use type.IsNaN(field) comparison instead of field == NaN, since NaN != NaN
in IEEE 754 (equality check always returns false).

Changes:
- TypesCatalog: add float/double entries + IsFloatingPoint() helper
- NullableValueFieldDefinition: extract AppendNullCheck() with IsNaN branch
- OptionalTypeDefinition: use shared AppendNullCheck()
- OptionalMessageFieldDefinition: IsNaN branch for float/double getters

Also adds EndianPropertyBenchmarks for future big-endian work (benchmarks
comparing direct field access vs property passthrough vs bswap).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add Azure Network Security Perimeter (NSP) support (#15711)

* Add Azure Network Security Perimeter (NSP) support

Implement NSP resources for securing PaaS services (Storage, Key Vault,
Cosmos DB, SQL) within a logical network boundary. NSPs are the PaaS-layer
equivalent of VNets/NSGs, grouping resources so they can communicate
internally while restricting public access via access rules.

New APIs:
- AddNetworkSecurityPerimeter() - creates an NSP with a default profile
- WithAccessRule() - adds inbound/outbound rules (IP prefixes, subscriptions,
  FQDNs, service tags)
- AssociateWith() - explicitly associates a PaaS resource with an NSP
- AssociateAllPaaSResources() - auto-associates all IAzureNspAssociationTarget
  resources in the app model

New types:
- AzureNetworkSecurityPerimeterResource
- AzureNspAccessRule (DTO for rule configuration)
- IAzureNspAssociationTarget (implemented by Storage, KeyVault, CosmosDB, SQL)
- NspAssociationTargetAnnotation (for provisioning dependency ordering)

Associations use Enforced access mode by default. Generated Bicep targets
the 2025-05-01 API version via Azure.Provisioning.Network 1.1.0-beta.2.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Remove unnecessary code.

* Change lists to not be nullable.

* Add support for ReferenceExpression

* Implement IAzureNspAssociationTarget on all supported resources

* Add support for NSP AccessMode

* Address PR feedback

* Add test for AssociateWith duplicate association name validation

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Respond to PR feedback

* Fix tests

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
chore: consolidate all open PRs (#296, #298, #300, #295, #283, #297, #288) with CI fixes (#303)

## Summary

Consolidates 7 open PRs into a single branch, resolving all CI failures
and merge conflicts. Each PR was merged in dependency order (config/docs
first, then code), with targeted fixes applied for the two CI-breaking
issues.

## PRs Merged (in dependency order)

1. **#296** — Production readiness gates (commit signing, metadataBase,
trusted bot logins)
2. **#298** — Skill docs: deprecated `NEXT_PUBLIC_ENGINE_URL` →
`ENGINE_URL`/`AGENTS_URL` proxy pattern
3. **#300** — Claude Code MCP server config (.vscode/mcp.json)
4. **#295** — Full-repo audit resolving issues #194-203 (ESLint for
agents, issue template YAML forms, starlette upgrade)
5. **#283** — Cursor-based keyset pagination for agent alerts (new
migration, pagination API)
6. **#297** — Code quality: memory leak fixes, file decomposition,
duplication reduction (64 files)
7. **#288** — CSS container-query scoping for pane-nested grids

## CI Fixes Applied

| PR | Failure | Root Cause | Fix |
|---|---|---|---|
| #295 | `Test Web` build error | Next.js 16.2 rejects coexisting
`middleware.ts` and `proxy.ts` | Removed `middleware.ts` (proxy.ts
handles auth + rate limiting) |
| #297 | `Test Engine` ImportError | `order_service.py` imported
`BrokerInterface` and `RiskResult` (nonexistent) | Changed to
`BrokerAdapter` and `PreTradeCheck` (actual class names) |
| #297+#283 | Merge conflict in `server.ts` | #297 decomposed server.ts
into route modules; #283 added pagination inline | Took #297's modular
approach, ported #283's pagination into `routes/alerts.ts` |

## Additional Cleanup
- Removed unused `eslint-disable @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars` in
`server.ts`
- Removed unused `noqa: ANN001` directives in `signal_service.py`

## PRs to Close After Merge
- **#301** — Previous consolidation attempt (superseded)
- **#287** — Stale draft (superseded)

## Validation

| Check | Result |
|---|---|
| `pnpm lint` | ✅ 0 errors, 3 packages |
| `pnpm test` | ✅ 1,122 tests passed (105 files, 3 packages) |
| `pnpm test:engine` | ✅ 474 tests passed |
| `ruff check + format` | ✅ Clean |
| Code Review | ✅ No issues found |

Closes #296, #298, #300, #295, #283, #297, #288
Supersedes #301, #287

---------

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix(a11y): 修正 GamepadMessageBox 圖示無障礙語義與 Task.Run 取消令牌缺漏

修正兩項由全面程式碼風險分析發現的問題：

1. GamepadMessageBox A11y 缺漏
   - 新增 _icon 欄位以存放 MessageBoxIcon 類型
   - UpdateDialogAccessibleDescription 將圖示語義（錯誤／警告／資訊／詢問）
     附加於 AccessibleDescription 前綴，確保螢幕閱讀器能播報對話框嚴重程度
   - PictureBox 新增 AccessibleRole.Graphic 與具名 AccessibleName，
     當使用者鍵盤導覽至圖示時能獲得正確說明
   - lblText 新增 AccessibleRole.StaticText，明確標示訊息文字的語義角色
   - 新增 GetIconAccessibleName() 輔助方法（switch 表達式），
     依 MessageBoxIcon 類型回傳對應的當地語系化標籤
   - 四個語系均新增對應字串資源（en, zh-Hant, zh-Hans, ja）

2. MainForm.Events.cs Task.Run 取消令牌缺漏
   - 移除不必要的 Task.Run 包裝（OpenTouchKeyboardWithDelayAsync 本身已
     在 Task.Delay 時非同步讓出，無需另開執行緒）
   - OpenTouchKeyboardWithDelayAsync 新增 CancellationToken 參數，
     Task.Delay(150) 改為 Task.Delay(150, ct)
   - 呼叫端一次快照 _formCts?.Token ?? CancellationToken.None，
     避免 Form 關閉瞬間兩次讀取 _formCts 的競態條件
   - 取消時 OperationCanceledException 由 SafeFireAndForget 靜默吸收，
     符合現有的取消處理慣例

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: bare clone ref + issue reaction for implement workflow (#39)

## Problem

The implement workflow fails immediately with:
```
fatal: not a valid object name: 'origin/main'
```

`git clone --bare` doesn't create remote-tracking branches — refs live
at `refs/heads/main`, not `refs/remotes/origin/main`. This means
`create_branch_worktree` (used by implement) always fails.

Also, when the implement workflow triggers via the `agent` label,
there's no feedback on the issue — no reaction, no comment. The
`/implement` comment path gets a 🚀 reaction, but the label path is
silent.

## Fix

1. **`git.py`**: Reference `main` instead of `origin/main` in
`create_branch_worktree`
2. **`implement.yaml`**: Add 🚀 reaction on the issue when triggered via
label

## Testing

- All 32 tests pass
- Discovered while battle-testing the implement loop on issue #38

---------

Co-authored-by: Colin Cheung <11246116+ColinCee@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Add Flex Consumption support, remove Standard SKUs, add readiness polling

- Add flex-consumption as third deployment target (serverless, no App Service Plan)
- Remove deprecated Standard (S1-S3) and Basic (B1-B3) SKUs from all setup tooling
- Add readiness polling (12 retries x 10s) before post-deploy API calls
- Skip explicit App Insights creation for Flex (auto-created by platform)
- Update GUI wizard: flex-consumption as default/recommended option
- Update .env.template: default DEPLOY_TARGET changed to flex-consumption
- Update README.md, Setup.md, setup/README.md with Flex Consumption docs
- Update hosting comparison table with Flex column, remove Standard column

commit.message:
feat: pure WASM streaming for AdLib + OPL effect display

AdLib formats (HSC, D00, LDS, etc.) now use pure WASM streaming playback
instead of hybrid TS replayer + OPL3 synth. The AdPlug WASM player handles
all format-specific effects natively — no manual effect mapping needed.

Added OPL3 to nativeWholePlayerTypes so the TS replayer doesn't fire notes
on top of the WASM streaming player (was causing double playback + broken
effects).

Pattern display improvements:
- OPL effects shown as ~F (feedback), ~C (carrier vol), ~M (mod vol),
  ~V (inst vol) with amber color category
- Effect tooltips explain each OPL effect
- Both DOM and GL renderers handle the ~ prefix display
- Non-CmodPlayer formats (HSC, S3M, LDS) bypass cmodCmdToXM mapping

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Make drops fly past the planet instead of in random directions (#381)

* Initial plan

* Make drops travel toward planet without intersecting it

Calculate drop trajectory angle so drops pass within 100px of the
planet edge but never through it. Uses angular offset from direct
aim based on a random miss distance in [PLANET_HIT_RADIUS,
PLANET_HIT_RADIUS + 100], with random left/right side selection.

Tags are still passed via article:tag in Open Graph for social platforms.
